name: Munakkaya Kura
steps: Crackle mustard seeds in oil, then saute onion, curry leaves and ginger garlic paste.
Add tomatoes, turmeric, chilli powder and coriander powder, and cook to a thick masala.
Add the drumstick pieces and salt, and coat them in the masala.
Pour a cup of water, cover and simmer until the drumsticks are tender and the gravy thickens.
Finish with grated coconut and serve with rice — suck the pulp from the pods!
